/nix/store/a0d7m3zn9p2dfa1h7ag9h2wzzr2w25sn-gcc-wrapper-14.2.1.20250322/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/link.d -shared  -o /home/runner/workspace/engine/build_output/nse_engine_cpp.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/bindings/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/src/data_ingestion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/src/indicators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/src/signals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/src/backtest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nse_engine_cpp.dir/cpp/src/benchmark.cpp.o
